identity.role: Computer Engineering student · Client-ready problem solver
intro: I am a technology-minded student about to begin a Computer Engineering degree, with practical experience delivering paid digital work to clients. I bring [[advanced working English, care with detail and a genuinely helpful attitude]] to every role.
I am looking for responsible part-time opportunities where I can contribute with organisation, client communication and reliable follow-through.

rail.howIWork: Curious by default. I enjoy understanding how things work, improving the small details and turning ideas into useful, well-organised results.
strengths: Clear, thoughtful communication in Spanish and English.
Reliable with timing, procedures and client follow-up.
Calm, practical problem-solving and fast learning.

items.title: Computer Engineering degree - starting in 2026
items.description: University studies focused on software, computing systems and engineering foundations, while I continue developing a practical portfolio alongside my degree.

items.title: Spanish Baccalaureate (Bachillerato) - completed
items.description: Completed upper-secondary education and the university entrance process while pursuing independent creative and technical projects outside class.

items.title: Cambridge English: C1 Advanced - examination completed
items.description: Result pending. Confident in written and spoken English: formal writing, reports, instructions, proposals and real-time conversation.

workingStyle: Quick learning with new systems and tools.

items.title: Freelance digital creator & client delivery
items.description: Completed paid digital projects for international clients, independently managing **briefs, requirements, revisions, deadlines and final delivery**. My work combined creative and technology-focused tasks, SEO-ready media content and bilingual client communication.

portfolio.main: See selected work, background and the projects I am building at {{amedina.dev}}.
portfolio.sub: Scan the QR code or visit the website for my professional portfolio.
